issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnKO' but requires a condition to specify 'K.O.'d by your opponent's effect' — currently missing the opponent causality check
Action type should be 'FlipLife' (add to top of Life cards), not 'SearchDeck' which draws to hand. Card text says 'add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards'
Filter 'Any' is imprecise; should specify max 1 card ('maxCount':1) to match 'up to 1 card'
Missing condition to restrict KO source to 'opponent's effect' — need a condition like OpponentEffect or similar causality check
